title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at LIC

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at LIC
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with LIC! We are hiring a Financial Analyst for our Hyderabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About LIC:
LIC is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LIC!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
